multiFactorAuthDescription: Saita hanyar tabbatarwa ta mataki biyu don ƙara tsaro ga asusunka
updatePasswordSuccess: An aike buƙatar sabunta kalmar sirri
updatePasswordSuccessMessage: An sabunta kalmar sirrinka da nasara!
name: Sunanka
nameDescription: Sabunta sunanka don nuna shi a bayananku
accountImageDescription: Ka zaɓi hoto don ɗora a matsayin hotonka.
profilePictureSubheading: Ka zaɓi hoto don ɗora a matsayin hotonka.
updatePasswordCardDescription: Sabunta kalmar sirrinka don kare asusunka.
repeatPasswordDescription: Ka maimaita sabuwar kalmar sirrinka don tabbatarwa
updateEmailCardDescription: Sabunta adireshin imel da kake amfani da shi wajen shiga asusunka
updateEmailSuccessMessage: Mun aiko maka imel don tabbatar da sabon adireshin imelinka. Ka duba akwatin imelinka ka danna hanyar haɗin don tabbatarwa.
updateEmailError: Ba a sabunta imel ba. Sake gwadawa
passwordNotMatching: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba. Tabbatar kana amfani da kalmar sirri daidai
emailNotMatching: Imel ɗin ba su dace ba. Tabbatar kana amfani da imel daidai
passwordNotChanged: Ba a canza kalmar sirrinka ba
emailsNotMatching: Imel ɗin ba su dace ba. Tabbatar kana amfani da imel daidai
cannotUpdatePassword: Ba zaka iya sabunta kalmar sirrinka ba saboda asusunka ba a haɗa shi da wani ba.
multiFactorSetupErrorDescription: Yi haƙuri, an samu kuskure wajen saita abubuwa. Sake gwadawa.
multiFactorAuthHeading: Kare asusunka da Tabbatarwa ta Mataki Biyu
multiFactorModalHeading: Yi amfani da manhajar tabbatarwa don duba alaman QR da ke ƙasa, sa'an nan shigar da lamba da aka ƙirƙira.
factorNameHint: Yi amfani da suna mai sauƙin tunawa. Misali: iPhone 14
factorsListErrorDescription: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya loda jerin abubuwa ba. Sake gwadawa.
mfaEnabledSuccessTitle: An kunna Tabbatarwa ta Mataki Biyu
mfaEnabledSuccessDescription: Barka da zuwa! Ka yi rajista da nasara don tsarin tabbatarwa ta mataki biyu. Yanzu za ka iya shiga asusunka da haɗe-haɗen kalmar sirrinka da lambar tabbatarwa.
verifyActivationCodeDescription: Shigar da lambar tabbatarwa da manhajar tabbatarwarka ta ƙirƙira
qrCodeErrorDescription: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya ƙirƙira alaman QR ba
multiFactorSetupSuccess: An yi rajista da abu da nasara
mfaEnabledSuccessAlert: An kunna Tabbatarwa ta Mataki Biyu
invalidVerificationCodeDescription: Lambar tabbatarwa da ka shigar ba daidai ba ce. Sake gwadawa.
unenrollFactorModalDescription: Kana gab da soke wannan abu. Ba za ka iya amfani da shi wajen shiga asusunka ba.
unenrollFactorModalBody: Kana gab da soke wannan abu. Ba za ka iya amfani da shi wajen shiga asusunka ba.
selectFactor: Zaɓi abu don tabbatar da kanka
disablingMfa: Ana kashe Tabbatarwa ta Mataki Biyu. Ka jira...
disableMfaSuccess: An kashe Tabbatarwa ta Mataki Biyu da nasara
disableMfaError: Yi haƙuri, mun samu kuskure. Ba a kashe MFA ba.
sendEmailVerificationLinkSuccess: An aika hanyar tabbatarwa da nasara
sendEmailVerificationLinkError: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya aiko maka imel ba
verifyEmailAlertHeading: Ka tabbatar da imelinka don kunna MFA
verificationLinkAlertDescription: Ba a tabbatar da imelinka tukuna. Ka tabbatar da shi don iya saita Tabbatarwa ta Mataki Biyu.
authFactorNameHint: Sanya suna don taimaka maka tunawa da lambar wayar da aka yi amfani da ita
loadingUser: Ana loda bayanan mai amfani. Ka jira...
dangerZoneDescription: Wasu ayyuka ba za a iya sauya su ba. Ka yi hankali.
deleteAccountDescription: Wannan zai share asusunka da duk asusun da kake mallakarsu. Bugu da ƙari, za mu soke kuɗin biyan kuɗi masu aiki nan da nan. Ba za a iya sauya wannan aiki ba.
deleteAccountErrorHeading: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya share asusunka ba
needsReauthenticationDescription: Kana buƙatar sake tabbatar da kanka don canza kalmar sirrinka. Ka fita ka sake shiga don canza kalmar sirrinka.
